title: arabis sagittata var. ovata
intro: Arabis sagittata var. ovata, also known as Mountain Crest or Arrow-leaved Rockcress, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and skin problems. Its leaves and roots are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Arabis sagittata var. ovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
